name: Acapulco Jicama Salad
recipeIngredient: peeled, and sliced into 1/4-inch thick circles
peeled, pitted, and sliced into 1-inch cubes
wash, dry, and tear into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together cilantro, lime juice, vinegar, oil, salt, and pepper.
2. Marinate the orange slices, avocado cubes, and jicama cubes in the lime-cilantro vinaigrette for 30 minutes.
3. Arrange lettuce on chilled salad plates.
4. Remove the orange, avocado, and jicama from the marinade and place them on the lettuce.
